headline: Is Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.B) Still Attractive After Recent Flat Share Price Performance?
summary: Wondering whether Berkshire Hathaway at around US$486 per share still offers good value, or if the easy gains are already behind it, starts with understanding what the current price actually reflects. The stock has been fairly steady over the past week, slipping about 0.4%, while it has risen 3.6% over the last month but is still down 2.1% year to date and 3.4% over the past year, even after a 51.7% gain over three years and a 68.0% gain over five years.
